title: Space Opera: The Aesthetics of Personhood in the Works and Worlds of Philip K. Dick
author: Gabriel Francis Mamola
card_summary: A doctoral dissertation from the University of Texas at Arlington examining the aesthetics of personhood in the works and worlds of Philip K. Dick. Analyzes how Dick's fiction constructs, interrogates, and deconstructs the concept of personhood through the lens of science fiction's formal and thematic possibilities.

assets.path: PaulPKDarchive/PKDpdf/Space Opera_ The Aesthetics of Personhood in the Works and Worlds.pdf
